title: Kanban - delete items
excerpt:
Please allow users to delete items from the Kanban view. 
I want to use Kanban’s as a quick way to visualise tasks, but must be able to delete items without having to go back to the item list. Currently having to retain …

posts.author: helloeido (Andy Johnston)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please allow users to delete items from the Kanban view.

I want to use Kanban’s as a quick way to visualise tasks, but must be able to delete items without having to go back to the item list. Currently having to retain accounts with Trello/Asana/ or Clickup to keep this feature.

posts.author: Blazej (Blazej Jedras)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 yes please - very annoying to have to switch to table view to delete an item.

in fact, could we have the action panel displayed whenever the card view of an item is shown? this would then allow to delete/duplicate items from any view that doesn’t currently support those actions such as kanban or calendar view.
